milestones.title: Club Founded
milestones.text: Seven riders in Los Angeles establish the Satyrs Motorcycle Club during a challenging era for LGBTQ+ visibility.

milestones.title: Traditions & Rides
milestones.text: Poker runs, charitable rides, and community events grow the club's presence and legacy.

milestones.title: Archival Work
milestones.text: Preservation of materials and club history becomes an ongoing effort.

milestones.title: Preserving the Legacy
milestones.text: The Satyrs prepare club archives for entrustment with the ONE Archives Foundation for public and academic study.
